# Delivery Driver Stock Picking Batch

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:1bc160f69135fabb514dcd26ef7438aacb45a170d7d17ed82a72ea4dbf7181dd
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of delivery and stock picking
batch and to allow you to see in stock picking batch drivers assigned in
pickings .

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to:

- Go to Inventory / Configuration / Settings.
- Active Batch Transfer and Delivery Methods.

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

01. Go to Inventory / Configuration / Shipping Methods.
02. Create new Shipping Method o choose one already created.
03. Choose Default Driver.
04. Go to Inventory / Operations / Transfer and create new Transfer.
05. Choose carrier.
06. The driver is automatically assigned.
07. You can change the driver without changing the carrier.
08. Go to Inventory / Operations / Batch Transfers and create new Batch.
09. Add picking created before.
10. Driver in batch is automatically assigned.
